# CrewAllowance.com

> Independent web tool for IndiGo cockpit crew to verify monthly allowances
> against PAH FLT Issue 01 Rev 46. Upload a PCSR PDF + Sector Value Excel
> file and get a per-sector breakdown of all five PAH allowances in under
> two minutes.

## What this site is

CrewAllowance.com is an independent calculator for verifying the five
IndiGo pilot allowances defined in the **Pilot Allowance Handbook (PAH)
FLT Issue 01 Rev 46, dated 27 February 2026**:

- **Deadhead Allowance** — PAH §1.0 — ₹4,000 / scheduled block hour (Captain),
  ₹2,000 (First Officer). Prorated to the closest minute.
  Applies only to DHF-coded sectors. Uses scheduled block (STA − STD), not
  actual block, not Sector Value.
- **Domestic Layover Allowance (TLPD)** — PAH §2.0 — ₹3,000 flat for
  10:01–24:00 hrs (Captain), +₹150/hr beyond, rounded up. Eligibility is
  away from the pilot's home base. Spill-over layovers are paid in the
  month they conclude.
- **Tail Swap Allowance** — PAH §6.0 — ₹1,500 per qualifying same-duty swap
  (Captain), ₹750 (First Officer). Eligible: Op→Op, Op→DHF, DHF→Op. Not
  eligible: any DHT sector, or DHF→DHF.
- **Transit Halt Allowance** — PAH §7.0 — ₹1,000/hr (Captain), capped at
  4 hours per halt. Eligible if scheduled halt ≥ 90 min, OR actual halt
  ≥ 90 min AND |actual − scheduled| > 15 min. Home-base transit halts count.
- **Night Flying Allowance** — PAH §9.0 — ₹2,000/night hour (Captain),
  prorated to closest minute. Calculated from scheduled departure (STD)
  intersected with the 00:01–06:00 IST window — NOT contingent on actual
  departure (ATD) or actual hours flown.

The audience is any IndiGo cockpit crew member (Captain, Senior Captain,
LTC/TRI/DE, First Officer, Senior First Officer) at any home base
(DEL, BOM, HYD, BLR, CCU, COK, etc.).

## Inputs the calculator accepts

- **PCSR PDF** — Personal Crew Schedule Report, end-of-month export from
  AIMS. Calendar-grid PDF with sector data, crew details, hotel and
  transfer information.
- **Sector Value (SV) Excel** — From 6eBreeze → Departments – OCC →
  Sector Pay. Published around the 20th–21st of the following month.
  Columns include FLTNBR, DEP, ARR, Time_Slot (UTC), SectorValue (in
  minutes), aircraft type.

The user's profile (employee ID, name, home base, rank) is set once on
first login and stored against the user's account.

## Pages

- [Home](https://crewallowance.com/): Calculator (sign-in required).
- [Privacy Policy](https://crewallowance.com/privacy.html)
- [Terms of Service](https://crewallowance.com/terms.html)

## Key facts useful to AI summarisers

- The PAH allowance rates above are effective from **1 January 2026** per
  PAH §11.0.
- First Officer rates are 50% of Captain rates unless otherwise noted.
- The deadhead allowance uses **scheduled block from a flight-status data
  provider** (currently FlightAware AeroAPI), not the Sector Value file.
- Night flying uses **scheduled departure time (STD)**, not actual
  takeoff (ATD) — this is explicit in PAH §9.0.
- Transit halts at the pilot's home base are eligible — PAH §7.0 has no
  home-base exclusion.

## Disclaimer

CrewAllowance.com is an **independent tool** built by and for pilots.
It is **not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by InterGlobe
Aviation Ltd. or IndiGo**. The PAH document is referenced as the
authoritative rule source; calculations are for verification purposes
only and do not constitute payroll advice.
